message:
fix(spawn_blocking): cap fallback thread creation at 256 (bd-2gik)

When no blocking pool is available, spawn_blocking_on_thread now limits
concurrent fallback threads via an atomic counter. Prevents unbounded
OS thread creation under load (e.g., rapid DNS lookups without runtime).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
